title: ranunculus cosmophyllus
intro: Ranunculus cosmophyllus, also known as Butcher's Broom, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus cosmophyllus include reducing swelling and pain in joints and muscles, as well as treating varicose veins and hemorrhoids due to its ability to improve blood circulation. Ranunculus cosmophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in ointments and creams for topical application.
